sn56.1:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, develop concentration. A bhikkhu who is concentrated understands things as they really are.
sn56.1:1.0.2: "Therefore, bhikkhus, an exertion should be made to understand: ‘This is suffering.’An exertion should be made to understand: ‘This is the origin of suffering.’ An exertion should be made to understand: ‘This is the cessation of suffering.’ An exertion should be made to understand: ‘This is the way leading to the cessation of suffering.’"
